title: 64x ShortSwords for Faithful
description: A crisp 64x64 resolution Add-on that replaces the Diamond Sword with a sleek, PvP-ready "short" model. Designed in Faithful 64x style to improve your field of view without losing the classic Minecraft feel.
body:
[64x] Diamond Sword Overhaul for Faithful
Overview
Tired of the standard 64x swords? This is a lightweight Add-on for the famous Faithful 64x (or any other 64x resource pack) that replaces the default Diamond Sword to "short-style" PvP-ready version.

Featuring a sharp 64x64 resolution, this sword is perfect for both building and competitive PvP. It provides a better view in combat without losing the classic Minecraft feel.

Key Features
High Fidelity: Crisp 64x64 textures.

PvP Friendly: Slightly shorter blade for a better field of view.

Seamless Integration: Designed to work perfectly with Faithful 64x.

Custom Icon: Includes a high-quality pack.png for your resource pack menu.

How to Install
Download the .zip file.

Drop it into your .minecraft/resourcepacks folder.

IMPORTANT: In the game settings, move this pack to the TOP of the list (above your main resource pack).

Enjoy your new blade!

Technical Details
Resolution: 64x64

Compatibility: 1.21.x (Works with older versions too by ignoring the warning)
